1 -- 45 Deg Elbow 4 -- Tee or Cross 7 -- Non-Return Valve
2 -- 90 Deg Standard Elbow 5 -- Gate Valve 8 -- Ball Valve
3 -- 90 Deg Long Radius Elbow 6 -- Swing Check Valve 9 -- Butterfly Valve
All fittings are as specified by user - no additional fittings have been generated automatically.
The supply demand graph is not available for the network without pump
